goals: Calculate how much their part-time job savings will grow with compound interest
Compare future values across different interest rates and time periods
Calculate the discounted price of an item they want to buy
Compare multiple discount percentages to find the best deal

user_agent_config.personality: Casually curious but easily bored. Prefers quick, practical calculations over theoretical explanations. Tends to focus on real-world applications relevant to their life as a student.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Has basic math skills but limited financial knowledge. Doesn't know compound interest formulas or financial terminology in depth. Understands percentages and basic arithmetic. Does not know tool names or internal APIs.

end_condition: The user has completed all financial calculations they needed and has the information to make decisions about their savings and purchase options.
